note: MTA's own STATION-LEVEL ADA accessibility declaration (design-time, not live outage status) — see src/catalog/mta-data/MTA-DISPLAY-GUIDE.md. Sources: data.ny.gov 4ta5-wz5s (interchange complexes, MTA-authored ada_notes) + 39hk-dx4f (per-line rows, all complexes). Refresh: npm run mta:station-ada. ada: 0=not accessible, 1=fully accessible, 2=partially accessible.
